title: How to Watch Samsung's London Unpacked Keynote: New Foldables and Snapdragon AI Watches Expected
summary: According to various reports, the spotlight will likely fall on the new Galaxy Z Fold 8 lineup of book-style devices while the simpler Galaxy Z Flip 8 plays second fiddle this time around.
